headline: JP Morgan Maintains Overweight on GoDaddy, Lowers Price Target to $124
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Alexei Gogolev   maintains GoDaddy (NYSE:GDDY) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $154 to $124.
